generate.description: Regenerates CLI commands from proto definitions via protoc-gen-zitadelcli.
generate.command: bash -c 'go install ./internal/protoc/protoc-gen-zitadelcli/ && rm -f apps/cli/gen/cmd_*.go && PATH="$(go env GOPATH)/bin:.artifacts/bin/$(go env GOOS)/$(go env GOARCH):$PATH" .artifacts/bin/$(go env GOOS)/$(go env GOARCH)/buf generate --path proto/zitadel/user/v2/user_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/org/v2/org_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/project/v2/project_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/app/v2/app_service.proto'

build.command: bash -c 'cd apps/cli && go build -ldflags "-X github.com/zitadel/zitadel/cmd/build.version=$(git describe --tags --always 2>/dev/null || echo dev) -X github.com/zitadel/zitadel/cmd/build.date=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" -o ../../.artifacts/bin/$(go env GOOS)/$(go env GOARCH)/zitadel-cli .'

lint.description: Runs go vet on the CLI.
